title: multidevice: add device_id to protocol
description:
Add device_id field to PublishKeyPackageParams in core/src/protocol.rs so the relay can distinguish multiple devices belonging to the same pub_id.

Why: the relay needs a stable per-device identifier to store and retrieve KeyPackages per device rather than per user. device_id is derived from the ECDH init key fingerprint in the KeyPackage — SHA-256 of the leaf's encryption key bytes. No extra state required; the client computes it from the KeyPackage it already generates.

What to do:
- Add optional or required device_id: String field to PublishKeyPackageParams
- Update any JSON-RPC serialization tests that construct PublishKeyPackageParams
- Document derivation: device_id = hex(SHA-256(leaf_node.encryption_key))

Acceptance: PublishKeyPackageParams serializes/deserializes with device_id field; existing tests pass.
close_reason: device_id field added to PublishKeyPackageParams; relay validates 64-char lowercase hex; all call sites updated; all tests pass; review clean
